repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): restrict backend self-pairing shared auth
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair/finalization path for #90154.

Source PR credit: this carries forward coygeek's work from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90154.

Scope:
- Keep the existing #90154 behavior: shared gateway token/password auth should not use the direct-local backend self-pairing exception.
- Preserve dedicated backend paths for device-token and explicit auth.mode = "none" local backend connects.
- Keep bootstrap-token on the guarded pairing path, matching the concern noted from #72419.
- Validate the gateway auth tests and pnpm check:changed before merge.

Linked refs: fixes #72418; considers closed context #72419.
credit_notes: If a replacement PR becomes necessary after repair attempts, the PR body and any closeout comment must explicitly credit coygeek and identify #90154 as the source PR.
